case_title: SHEPPARD, CRAIG M. VS PACIFIC ENGINE EXCHANGE INC. C/O NELSON GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEPPARD, CRAIG M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC ENGINE EXCHANGE INC. C/O NELSON GONZALEZ STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
